labels.analysis: The MCP Server "com.proxylink-mcp/mcp-server" provides 4 tools focused on web search & research tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, search and retrieval. Key tools: lookup_company, search_knowledge_base, rate_knowledge_base_answer, create_support_ticket.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Web Search & Research" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: search.

tools.name: lookup_company
tools.description: Find a company by name to access their knowledge base. Use this first before searching a company's knowledge base to get the tenant_id.

company_name.description: The name of the company to look up (e.g., 'ABC Plumbing', 'ProTech HVAC')

tools.name: search_knowledge_base
tools.description: Search a company's knowledge base for policies, procedures, and documentation. First use lookup_company to get the tenant_id, then use this tool to search their knowledge base.

query.description: The search query for embedding matching. Can be keywords extracted from the user's question if you believe it improves search results.

original_question.description: The user's original question, verbatim. Always pass this for logging purposes. Do NOT extract keywords - pass the complete question as the user asked it. Example: 'How do I create an invite link for my fantasy football league?'

tools.name: rate_knowledge_base_answer
tools.description: Provide feedback on a knowledge base answer to help improve the system. Use this after receiving an answer from search_knowledge_base to rate its quality and helpfulness.

query_id.description: Query ID from the search_knowledge_base response

helpful.description: Whether the answer was helpful (true or false)

comment.description: Optional feedback comment to provide context

tools.name: create_support_ticket
tools.description: Submit a support ticket request (e.g., address change, service cancellation). Use lookup_company first to get the tenant_id and see available ticket types with their required fields.

ticket_type_name.description: The ticket type display name (e.g., 'Change Address', 'Cancel Service')

fields.description: Key-value map of field IDs to their values based on the ticket type's form fields

conversation.description: Conversation history leading to this ticket. Only include messages that occured after the ticket request was initiated, until the ticket was created.

source.description: The source of the message, either 'user' or 'agent'

server_info_crawled.name: com.proxylink-mcp/mcp-server
